positive: A stylized, geometric depiction of a rising sun over a vibrant, minimalistic cityscape. The sun is represented by layered semi-circles and radial bursts of color (gold, burnt orange, tangerine). The cityscape consists of clean, stacked architectural silhouettes of skyscrapers and gentle hills, all rendered in deep indigo and teal. The composition must be highly centralized and symmetrical, utilizing strong contrast between the bright sunrise colors and the cool, dramatic sky/buildings. Style: Mid-century modern graphic illustration meets clean linework vector art. Use dramatic flat lighting and bold, saturated color blocking suitable for apparel print. Aspect ratio is square, ensuring visual impact.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, low detail, noise, watermarks, signature, complex anatomy, grainy, asymmetrical, messy, photorealistic
